name: orbit-iptv
description: Web player for 12,500+ free live TV channels (iptv-org) with search, filters, geo-block detection, and an optional on-demand CORS/header proxy as a Cloudflare Pages Function.

scripts.pages:dev: vite build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.deploy: vite build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name orbit-iptv
